title: Error Handling Workflow
scenario: Design a workflow for handling errors in a web application. The workflow should include steps for identifying, logging, and resolving errors. The output should be in the format of a UML activity diagram.
constraints: The workflow should include at least 5 steps
The output should be under 1000 pixels in size

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the workflow includes at least 5 steps and is under 1000 pixels in size
Check if the UML syntax is correct
Check if each step is clearly described
